{{Short description|Adult film award}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=June 2023}}
{{Infobox award
| name           = [[AVN Award]] for Female Foreign Performer of the Year
| awarded_for    = Female Foreign Performer of the Year
| presenter      = [[AVN Media Network]]
| country        = [[United States]]
| year           = {{start date|2003}}<ref name="avnnom2003">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20021127014135/http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.shtml|title=AVN Award Nominees|work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|archivedate=November 27, 2002|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.shtml|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2002">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20011208103701/http://www.avnawards.com/nomin-list.html|title=AVN Awards Nominees|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=December 8, 2001|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nomin-list.html|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
| holder         = Eve Sweet
| website        = {{URL|http://avnawards.avn.com}}
}}

The '''[[AVN Award]] for Female Foreign Performer of the Year''' is an award that has been given by [[sex industry]] company [[AVN (magazine)|AVN]] since the award's inception in 2003.<ref name="avnnom2003"/><ref name="avnnom2002"/> [[French people|French]]-born [[pornographic film actors|actresses]] [[Katsuni]] and Anissa Kate and [[Czechs|Czech]]-born actress [[Little Caprice]] have each won the award three times,<ref name="avnwin2005">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20140118084336/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2005|title=2005 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=January 18, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2005|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnwin2006">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20140222223329/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2006|title=2006 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=February 22, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2006|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnwin2007">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20140222222149/https://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2007|title=2007 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=February 22, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2007|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref> while [[Hungarians|Hungarian]]-born [[Aleska Diamond]], [[Polish people|Polish]]-born Misha Cross, and [[Romanians|Romanian]]-born Eve Sweet have each won the award twice.<ref name="avnwin2012">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|title=AVN Announces the 2012 AVN Award Winners|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|date=January 22, 2012|accessdate=July 2, 2016|archive-date=May 13, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160513174915/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnwin2013">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/The-2013-AVN-Award-Winners-503520.html|title=The 2013 AVN Award Winners!|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|accessdate=July 2, 2016|archive-date=March 28, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150328015659/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/The-2013-AVN-Award-Winners-503520.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnwin2014">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2014 AVN Awards|work=AVN|date=January 21, 2014|accessdate=February 7, 2016|archive-date=February 1, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160201103626/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnwin2015">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20150128010221/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/5|archivedate=January 28, 2015|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/5|title=AVN - 2015 AVN Awards Show|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref>

{{As of|2025|January}}, the titleholder is Eve Sweet.

==Winners and nominees==

===2000s===
{| class=wikitable
|-
|align=center|'''Year'''
|align=center|'''Photo'''
|align=center|'''Winner'''
|align=center|'''Nominees'''
|-
|[[20th AVN Awards|2003]]<ref name="avnwin2003">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20131029194214/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2003|title=2003 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archivedate=October 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2003|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2003"/>
|[[File:Rita Faltoyano AVN Awards 2003.jpg|75px]]
|align=center|'''Rita Faltoyano'''<br>{{flagicon|Hungary}}
|align=center|Zora Banks<br>[[Lea De Mae]]<br>Sophie Evans<br>Jana<br>Daniella Rush
|-
|[[21st AVN Awards|2004]]<ref name="avnwin2004">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20131205023920/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2004|title=2004 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archivedate=December 5, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2004|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2004">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20031203023916/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf |title=AVN Award Nominees|work=AVN|archivedate=December 3, 2003|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf |accessdate=January 30, 2016}}</ref>
|
|align=center|'''Mandy Bright'''<br>{{flagicon|Hungary}}
|align=center|[[Mélanie Coste]]<br>Wanda Kurtis<br>Sophie Evans<br>Rita Faltoyano<br>Katja Kassin<br>[[Katsuni]]<br>Lucy Lee<br>Anna Nova<br>Alicia Rhodes<br>Stacy Silver<br>Monica Sweetheart<br>[[Katalin Vad|Michelle Wild]]
|-
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005]]<ref name="avnwin2005"/><ref name="avnnom2005">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20041114124447/http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml|title=2005 Nominees|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=November 14, 2004 |url=http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
|rowspan=3|[[File:Katsuni 2010.jpg|75px]]
|rowspan=3 align=center|'''[[Katsuni]]'''<br>{{flagicon|France}}
|align=center|Cristina Bella<br>[[Niki Belucci]]<br>Mandy Bright<br>[[Mélanie Coste]]<br>Jane Darling<br>Rita Faltoyano<br>Aneta Keys<br>Cindy Lords<br>Sandra Romain<br>Julie Silver<br>Liliane Tiger
|-
|[[23rd AVN Awards|2006]]<ref name="avnwin2006"/><ref name="avnnom2006">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20051126013107/http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf|title=2006 Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=November 26, 2005 |url=http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
|align=center|Sharka Blue<br>Mandy Bright<br>Brigitta Bulgari<br>Angel Dark<br>Rita Faltoyano<br>Tera Joy<br>Alicia Rhodes<br>Julie Silver<br>Stacy Silver<br>Barbara Summer<br>Liliane Tiger
|-
|[[24th AVN Awards|2007]]<ref name="avnwin2007"/><ref name="avnnom2007">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20070423104247/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations|title=AVN Award Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=April 23, 2007 |url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations|accessdate=July 2, 2016}}</ref>
|align=center|Cristina Bella<br>Mandy Bright<br>Angel Dark<br>Jane Darling<br>[[Mya Diamond]]<br>Tiffany Hopkins<br>Isabel Ice<br>Claudia Jamsson<br>Cindy Lords<br>[[Monica Mattos]]<br>Poppy Morgan<br>Claudia Rossi<br>Priscila Sol<br>Liliane Tiger
|-
|[[25th AVN Awards|2008]]<ref name="avnwin2008">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20131203050255/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2008|title=2008 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=December 3, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2008 |accessdate=July 4, 2016}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2008">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20080227073556/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf |title=2008 Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=February 27, 2008|url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf|accessdate=July 4, 2016}}</ref>
|
|align=center|'''[[Monica Mattos]]'''<br>
{{flagicon|Brazil}}
|align=center|Baroka Balls<br>Nikky Blond<br>Caylian Curtis<br>Suzie Diamond<br>Diana Doll<br>Clara G<br>Isabel Ice<br>Melissa Lauren<br>Divinity Love<br>Oksana<br>Nikki Rider<br>Liliane Tiger<br>[[Tarra White]]<br>[[Yasmine Lafitte|Yasmine]]
|-
|[[26th AVN Awards|2009]]<ref name="avnwin2009">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html|title=AVN - 2009 AVN Award-Winners Announced|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|last=Sullivan|first=David|date=January 11, 2009|accessdate=July 4, 2016|archive-date=May 3, 2012|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120503094829/http://business.avn.com/articles/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="avnnom2009">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20090105164506/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf|title=2009 AVN Nominations|work=AVN|archivedate=January 5, 2009|url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf|accessdate=July 4, 2016}}</ref>
|[[File:Eve Angel 1.jpg|75px]]
|align=center|'''Eve Angel'''<br>
{{flagicon|Hungary}}
|align=center|Black Angelika<br>Bambi<br>Chloe Delaure<br>Dian Doll<br>Regina Ice<br>Melissa Lauren<br>Loona Luxx<br>Roxy Panther<br>Peaches<br>Claudia Rossi<br>Viva Style<br>Cecilia Vega<br>[[Tarra White]]<br>[[Yasmine Lafitte|Yasmine]]
|}

===2010s===
{| class=wikitable
|-
|align=center|'''Year'''
|align=center|'''Photo'''
|align=center|'''Winner'''
|align=center|'''Nominees'''
|-
|[[27th AVN Awards|2010]]<ref name="avnwin2010">{{cite web|url=http://www.xbiz.com/news/116352 |title=2010 AVN Adult Movie Awards Winners Announced|work=XBIZ|publisher=Adnet Media|last=Johnson|first=Bob|date=January 11, 2010|accessdate=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|[[File:Aletta Ocean at Venus Berlin 2010 crop.jpg|75px]]
|align=center|'''Aletta Ocean'''<br>
{{flagicon|Hungary}}
|align=center|Blue Angel<br>Stella DelCroix<br>Cindy Hope<br>Regina Ice<br>Jodie James<br>Cherry Jul<br>Melissa Lauren<br>Madison Parker<br>Anita Pearl<br>Monica Santhiago<br>Sofia Valentine<br>Cecilia Vega<br>[[Tarra White]]<br>[[Yasmine Lafitte|Yasmine]]
|-
|[[28th AVN Awards|2011]]<ref name="avnwin2011">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2011-AVN-Awards-421782.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2011 AVN Awards|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|date=January 9, 2011|accessdate=July 24, 2016|archive-date=July 7, 2012|archive-url=https://archive.today/20120707163600/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2011-AVN-Awards-421782.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|[[File:Angel Dark.jpg|75px]]
|align=center|'''[[Angel Dark]]'''<br>
{{flagicon|Slovakia}}
|align=center|Aliz<br>Blue Angel<br>Jenny Baby<br>Black Angelika<br>Lou Charmelle<br>Carla Cox<br>Mandy Dee<br>[[Aleska Diamond]]<br>Cindy Hope<br>Lea Lexis<br>Kerry Louise<br>Natasha Marley<br>Jessica Moore<br>[[Tarra White]]
|-
|[[29th AVN Awards|2012]]<ref name="avnwin2012"/><ref name="avnnom2012">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20130329124455/http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf|title=2012 AVN Award Nominations|work=AVN|archivedate=March 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf|accessdate=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|align=center rowspan=2|
|align=center rowspan=2|'''[[Aleska Diamond]]'''<br>
{{flagicon|Hungary}}
|align=center|Blue Angel<br>Black Angelika<br>Lou Charmelle<br>[[Liza Del Sierra]]<br>Cindy Dollar<br>Eufrat<br>Cathy Heaven<br>Franceska Jaimes<br>Gemma Massey<br>Aletta Ocean<br>[[Anna Polina]]<br>Jessie Volt<br>[[Tarra White]]<br>Zafira 
|-
|[[30th AVN Awards|2013]]<ref name="avnwin2013"/><ref name="avnnom2013">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20130328092725/http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf|title=2013 Nominations|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=March 28, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf|accessdate=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|align=center|Aliz<br>Black Angelika<br>Claire Castel<br>Carla Cox<br>Laura Crystal<br>Franceska Jaimes<br>Anissa Kate<br>Jenna Lovely<br>Aletta Ocean<br>[[Anna Polina]]<br>Ivana Sugar<br>Paige Turnah<br>Jessie Volt<br>[[Tarra White]]
|-
|[[31st AVN Awards|2014]]<ref name="avnwin2014"/><ref name="avnnom2014">{{cite web|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20140126094717/http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3|title=AVN Awards|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archivedate=January 26, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3|accessdate=July 24, 2016}}</ref>
|align=center rowspan=2|[[File:Anissa Kate AVN Photos AEE Expo Las Vegas 2012.jpg|75px]]
|align=center rowspan=2|'''Anissa Kate'''<br>
{{flagicon|France}}
|align=center|Nikita Bellucci<br>[[Samantha Bentley]]<br>Claire Castel<br>Ava Dalush<br>Tiffany Doll<br>[[Marica Hase]]<br>Henessy<br>Cindy Hope<br>Jasmine Jae<br>Cayenne Klein<br>[[Valentina Nappi]]<br>Lyen Parker<br>[[Anna Polina]]<br>Ivana Sugar
|-
|[[32nd AVN Awards|2015]]<ref name="avnwin2015"/><ref name="avnnom2015">{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/4|title=AVN - 2015 AVN Awards Show|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20141230202705/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/4|archivedate=December 30, 2014|accessdate=July 26, 2016}}</ref>
|align=center|Abbie Cat<br>[[Samantha Bentley]]<br>Alexis Crystal<br>Tiffany Doll<br>{{ill|Gina Gerson|ru|Джина_Джерсон}}<br>Cathy Heaven<br>Henessy<br>Jasmine Jae<br>Francesca Jaimes<br>Lola Reve<br>Ivana Sugar<br>Mira Sunset<br>[[Lola Taylor]]<br>Charlize Tinkerbell
|-
|[[33rd AVN Awards|2016]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |title=2016 AVN AWARD NOMINATIONS |accessdate=November 20, 2015 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20151120162020/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |archivedate=November 20, 2015 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/winners|title=2016 AVN Awards Winners|accessdate=January 24, 2016|date=January 24, 2016|magazine=AVN|archive-date=November 28, 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161128025847/http://avnawards.avn.com/winners/|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|align=center rowspan=2|
|align=center rowspan=2|'''Misha Cross'''<br>
{{flagicon|Poland}}
|align=center|[[Samantha Bentley]]<br>Stella Cox<br>Alexis Crystal<br>Sienna Day<br>Tiffany Doll<br>Tina Hot<br>Jasmine Jae<br>Franceska Jaimes<br>Anissa Kate<br>Manon Martin<br>Mea Melone<br>[[Amarna Miller]]<br>Lola Reve<br>Taylor Sands
|-
|[[34th AVN Awards|2017]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees |title=AVN Awards 2017 Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=November 17, 2016|magazine=Adult Video News|accessdate=July 12, 2017|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20170113172207/https://avn.com/awards/nominees |archivedate=January 13, 2017}}</ref><ref name="Winners">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2017-avn-award-winners-announced-712151.html |title=2017 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 21, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2017}}</ref>
|align=center|Amirah Adara<br>[[Samantha Bentley]]<br>Claire Castel<br>Stella Cox<br>Sienna Day<br>Tiffany Doll<br>Lea Guerlin<br>Jasmine Jae<br>Ines Lenvin<br>Lexi Lowe<br>[[Amarna Miller]]<br>[[Anna Polina]]<br>Nekane Sweet<br>Alexa Tomas
|-
|[[35th AVN Awards|2018]]<ref name="nominees">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/nominees-unveiled-for-2018-avn-awards-751192.html |title=Nominees Unveiled for 2018 AVN Awards |author=Peter Warren |date=November 18, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=February 4, 2018}}</ref>
|
|align=center|'''Jasmine Jae'''<br>
{{flagicon|United Kingdom}}
|align=center|Amirah Adara<br>Nikita Bellucci<br>Misha Cross<br>Eveline Dellai<br>Susy Gala<br>Gina Gerson<br>Anissa Kate<br>Cherry Kiss<br>Apolonia Lapiedra<br>[[Amarna Miller]]<br>[[Anna Polina]]<br>Valentina Ricci<br>Julia Roca<br>Alexa Tomas
|-
|[[36th AVN Award|2019]]<ref>{{cite magazine |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2019-avn-813648.html|title=2019 AVN Award Winners Announced|date=January 27, 2019|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
|[[File:Anissa Kate AVN Photos AEE Expo Las Vegas 2012.jpg|75px]]
|align=center|'''Anissa Kate'''<br>
{{flagicon|France}}
|align=center|Amirah Adara<br>[[Little Caprice]]<br>Misha Cross<br>Cassie del Isla<br>Clea Gaultier<br>Ella Hughes<br>Gina Gerson<br>Jasmine Jae<br>Tina Kay<br>Alyssia Kent<br>Cherry Kiss<br>Apolonia Lapiedra<br>Texas Patti<br>Tiffany Tatum
|}

===2020s===
{| class=wikitable
|-
|align=center|'''Year'''
|align=center|'''Photo'''
|align=center|'''Winner'''
|align=center|'''Nominees'''
|-
|[[37th AVN Awards|2020]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2020 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 28, 2020}}</ref><ref name=2020w>{{cite web|url= https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2020-avn-award-winners-announced-863917.html|title=2020 AVN Award Winners Announced |date=January 25, 2020 |magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
||[[File:Little Caprice from &quot;Cheers to live&quot;.jpg|75px]]
|align=center|'''[[Little Caprice]]'''<br>
{{flagicon|Czech}}
|align=center|Amirah Adara<br>Misha Cross<br> Anna de Ville<br> Lady Dee <br> Cassie del Isla<br> Clea Gaultier <br> Lucy Heart<br> Apolonia Lapiedra <br> Anissa Kate<br> Tina Kay<br> Cherry Kiss<br> Barbie Sins<br>Tiffany Tatum<br> Rebecca Volpetti
|-
|[[38th AVN Awards|2021]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2021_nominees|title=2021 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=November 20, 2020}}</ref><ref name="AVN2021">{{cite web|url= https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2021-avn-award-winners-announced-895732.html|title=2021 AVN Award Winners Announced |date=January 23, 2021|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
||
|align=center|'''Clea Gaultier'''<br>
{{flagicon|France}}
|align=center|[[Little Caprice]]<br> Alexis Crystal<br> Anna de Ville<br> Cassie Del Isla<br> Angelika Grays<br> Jasmine Jae<br> Anissa Kate<br> Tina Kay<br> Nelly Kent<br> Cherry Kiss<br> [[Jia Lissa]]<br> Liya Silver<br> Sybil<br> Tiffany Tatum
|-
|2022<ref name=avn2022>{{cite web | url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2022-avn-award-winners-announced-905527.html | title=2022 AVN Award Winners Announced AVN }}</ref>
|rowspan=2|[[File:Little Caprice from &quot;Cheers to live&quot;.jpg|75px]]
|align=center rowspan=2|'''[[Little Caprice]]'''<br>
{{flagicon|Czech}}
|align=center|Ginebra Bellucci<br>Anna de Ville<br>Cassie del Isla<br>Clea Gaultier<br>Angelika Grays<br>Tina Kay<br>Cherry Kiss<br>[[Jia Lissa]]<br>Baby Nicols<br>Kaisa Nord<br>Liya Silver<br>Sybil<br>Rebecca Volpetti<br>Zaawaadi
|-
|2023
|align=center|Alexis Crystal<br>Anna de Ville<br>Shalina Devine<br>[[Eva Elfie]]<br>Clea Gaultier<br>Romy Indy<br>Eden Ivy<br>Cherry Kiss<br>Veronica Leal<br>[[Rae Lil Black]]<br>[[Jia Lissa]]<br>Clara Mia<br>Liya Silver<br>Sybil
|-
|2024
|
|align=center|'''Cherry Kiss'''<br>
{{flagicon|Serbia}}
|align=center|[[Little Caprice]]<br>Kelly Collins<br>Alexis Crystal<br>Anna de Ville<br>Shalina Devine<br>Eden Ivy<br>Scarlett Jones<br>Catherine Knight<br>Geisha Kyd<br>Veronica Leal<br>Clara Mia<br>Tiffany Tatum<br>Christy White<br>Zaawaadi
|-
|2025
|rowspan=2|
|align=center rowspan=2|'''Eve Sweet'''<br>
{{flagicon|Romania}}
|align=center|Amirah Adara<br>[[Little Caprice]]<br>Kelly Collins<br>Anna de Ville<br>Eden Ivy<br>Jadilica<br>Catherine Knight<br>Veronica Leal<br>Lia Lin<br>Clara Mia<br>Tiffany Tatum<br>Agatha Vega<br>Christy White<br>Zaawaadi
|-
|2026<ref>https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971</ref>
|align=center|Amirah Adara<br>Cherry Candle<br>[[Little Caprice]]<br>Alexis Crystal<br>Amalia Davis<br>Anna de Ville<br>Shalina Devine<br>Eden Ivy<br>Jadilica<br>Catherine Knight<br>Lia Lin<br>Matty Mila Perez<br>Martina Smeraldi<br>Tiffany Tatum
|}

{|class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;" 
!Country of origin
!Titles
!Number of performers
|-
|{{flagicon|France}} [[Pornography in France|France]]
|7
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|Hungary}} [[Pornography in Hungary|Hungary]]
|6
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|Czech}} [[Pornography in the Czech Republic|Czech Republic]]
|3
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Poland}} Poland
|2
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Romania}} Romania
|2
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Pornography in Brazil|Brazil]]
|1
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Slovakia}} Slovakia 
|1
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Pornography in the United Kingdom|United Kingdom]]
|1
|1
|-
|{{flagicon|Serbia}} Serbia
|1
|1
|-
|rowspan=14 |2026<ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees Announced|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced|url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
|rowspan=14 align=center|
|rowspan=14 align=center|'''Eve Sweet'''
|align=center|Amirah Adara
|-
|align=center|Cherry Candle
|-
|align=center|Little Caprice
|-
|align=center|Alexis Crystal
|-
|align=center|Amalia Davis
|-
|align=center|Anna de Ville
|-
|align=center|Shalina Devine
|-
|align=center|Eden Ivy
|-
|align=center|Jadilica
|-
|align=center|Catherine Knight
|-
|align=center|Lia Lin
|-
|align=center|Matty Mila Perez
|-
|align=center|Martina Smeraldi
|-
|align=center|Tiffany Tatum
|}

==See also==
* [[AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year]]

==References==
{{reflist|30em}}

{{AVN Female Foreign}}
{{AVN}}

[[Category:Awards established in 2003]]
[[Category:AVN Awards|Female Foreign Performer of the Year]]
